zh.lifeSummary: 當Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog於大約1050年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon22歲，母親Joan verch Cadwgan32歲。他於1080年與Gwenllian verch Iestyn在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他埋葬在威爾士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog于大约1050年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon22岁，母亲Joan verch Cadwgan32岁。他于1080年与Gwenllian verch Iestyn在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他埋葬在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

en.lifeSummary: When Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog was born about 1050, in Wales, his father, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, was 22 and his mother, Joan verch Cadwgan, was 32. He married Gwenllian verch Iestyn in 1080, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He was buried in Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog est né environ 1050, à Galles, son père, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan verch Cadwgan, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian verch Iestyn en 1080, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Ilenterré à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog um 1050 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon 22 und seine Mutter Joan verch Cadwgan 32. Er hat 1080 in Wales Gwenllian verch Iestyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er wurde in Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog è nato il circa 1050 nel Galles, il suo padre, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan verch Cadwgan, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian verch Iestyn nel 1080, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolto a Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniogが約1050年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Breconは22歳，母Joan verch Cadwganは32歳であった。1080年にウェールズでGwenllian verch Iestynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog(이)가 대략 1050년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan verch Cadwgan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1080년 웨일스에서 Gwenllian verch Iestyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 웨일스에 묻혔다.

mg.Breconshire, Wales: Breconshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Gales, seu pai, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan verch Cadwgan, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian verch Iestyn em 1080, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele foi sepultado em Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog родился около 1050 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan verch Cadwgan, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian verch Iestyn в 1080 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он был похоронен в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog nació aproximadamente 1050, en Gales, su papá, Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan verch Cadwgan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Gwenllian verch Iestyn en 1080, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Fue sepultado en Gales.
